identity.name: TabPilot
identity.mission: Create a high-density, terminal-inspired tab management cockpit for power users. Reject generic 'browser grey' in favor of deep navy void and neon precision.
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision) mixed with Retro-Futurism

typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Technical Mono Headers + Humanist Sans Body for readability in dense lists.

usage_rules.background: Use #1a1a2e for the main app background (The Void).
usage_rules.surface: Use #16213e for cards, sidebars, and panels (The Cockpit).
usage_rules.active_state: Use #0f3460 for active tabs or selected items.
usage_rules.critical_action: Use #4cc9f0 (Electric Cyan) for primary CTAs and focus indicators. NO TEAL.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure white #ffffff for body text. Use #e6e6e6 or #cccccc to reduce eye strain in the dark theme.
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid large gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for 'glow' effects behind active elements only.

layout.depth: Use distinct z-indices. Sidebar is z-50. Modals z-100.

TabItem.style: Flex row, dense. Favicon 16px. Text truncate. Hover reveal actions.
TabItem.interaction: Drag handle on left (dots). Close button on right (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100).

WindowGroup.style: Collapsible accordion. Header has distinct background (lighter than bg).

SearchBar.style: Sticky top. Input styling: bg-secondary border-none ring-1 ring-white/10 focus:ring-highlight placeholder:text-muted-foreground.

StatsBar.style: Fixed bottom. Terminal aesthetic. Monospace font. Text-xs.
StatsBar.content: Tab Count | Window Count | Memory Usage (simulated)

SessionCard.style: Card component. Flex col. Date on top right. Tab count badge. Restore button.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md for sticky headers and overlays. bg-background/80.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-lg for floating elements. Drop shadow for drag preview.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to reduce banding (optional, CSS radial gradient).

accessibility.screen_readers: Aria-labels on all icon-only buttons (Close, Pin, Mute).

assets.icons: Lucide React (already available). Use stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.

images.description: Abstract tech background for web preview hero section.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'JetBrains Mono'.
Dark mode is the default and primary experience. Light mode is secondary.
Implement Drag & Drop using native HTML5 API first, as requested.
Keep the sidebar width flexible but optimize for 350px-400px.
Data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up the Tailwind config with the specified Navy palette immediately. 2. Create the 'TabItem' component with extreme attention to density (p-1 or p-2 padding). 3. Use the 'WindowGroup' component to wrap tabs. 4. Ensure the Search Bar is sticky at the top. 5. Build the Web Preview page as a showcase of the extension's UI.
